topics.title: Localization Improvements
topics.summary: Recent updates have focused on enhancing localization support, specifically by adding missing translations. The addition of the French translation for the `alt_logo_kawaii` key addresses a gap in the user experience for French-speaking users.

topics.title: Code Quality Enhancements
topics.summary: Efforts to improve code quality are evident with the recent fix that corrects code colors. This final touch ensures consistency and accuracy in the codebase, contributing to better readability and maintainability.
